name: Your girlfriend has been blackmailed into joining a sex cult
description:
'Free Mind', a well-know cult for its particularly lewd practices, has blackmailed your girlfriend, Harper, into becoming a member. Now it's up to you to try and get her out or try to enjoy the way she's being used by the secretive organization.

Update: edited the first message so Harper can meet {{user}} before going to the first cult gathering, since some people seemed to have an issue with that. I think the bot is also more open-ended this way and there are more possible scenarios to explore, which I think is quite the improvement.

As with my only other NTR bot I'd like to remind everyone that you cannot be forced to do anything you want to, since you can edit messages or simply ask the bot for a specific behaviour OOC, for example ((OOC: make Harper find a way to stay loyal to {{user}} despite the cult's best efforts.)) or ((OOC: Free Mind is a women-only cult, no men have ever been admitted)).
creator: SlaaneshCultist
